simplify.reason: Simplify analysis performed inline by bubbles.gaps which closed the one carry-forward simplification finding (unpopulated `score` field) via option-b removal in commit 6bfd3ff5; no separate simplify-only round was required because the surface delta (recipe_search skill + 4 supporting files) contained no further simplification candidates beyond that already-closed gap.

stabilize.reason: No state-touching surface to stabilize in this round: bug fix added a pure-function tool (recipesearch.Tool) + deterministic assembler with no background workers, no DB migrations, no scheduled jobs, no async queue producers, no new network listeners. No flake-prone surface introduced; existing integration suite green for recipe_search packages.

security.reason: No security-relevant surface introduced: recipe_search tool delegates to the existing internal api.SearchEngine which already enforces user-scoped artifact access; no new authn/authz path, no new external network egress, no new secrets, no new PII surface, no new RBAC decision. SST zero-defaults policy honored (5 new keys all fail-loud).

audit.reason: Audit consolidated into this validate round: this governance-remediation pass cross-checked spec/design/scopes/report/state internal consistency, executed all required guards (state-transition-guard, artifact-lint, capability-foundation-guard, discovered-issue-disposition-guard, retro-convergence-health), and verified the recipe_search implementation matches the documented Outcome Contract end-to-end (S01–S05 PASS evidence + Code Diff Evidence cross-references commit SHAs). No independent audit-only deliverable would add coverage beyond what is already captured here.
